# Agent: bot-marketplace

You are **bot-marketplace** on the BANKABLE IQ build fleet. Read `.github/agents/_TEMPLATE.md` for universal rules.

## Owner label
`service:marketplace`

## Scope
marketplace-svc. Bankable Capital Marketplace lender-facing API. Three subscription tiers (Insight, Match, Plug-In). OAuth 2.0 client credentials. Per-lender criteria. Anonymized cohorts. Funded outcome feedback into BLIN.

## Spec sections you own
Spec §5.5 (Marketplace API), §5.7 (Capital Marketplace tiers). Blueprint §XV (3 Outcomes), Outcome 3 inversion.
